features.title: FEATURES
features.subtitle: Discover how GLIL has revolutionized claims processing through strategic technology implementation and innovation-driven solutions.

items.title: Strategic Utilization of Digital Technology
items.description: GLIL has effectively leveraged digital technology and its own resources to enhance its operations.

items.title: Innovation-Driven Claims Processing System
items.description: The implementation of an innovation-driven claims processing system has significantly improved the quality of claim processing.

items.title: Overcoming Geographical Barriers
items.description: Guardian Brac Bima (GBB), an agreement between Brac Microfinance and GLIL has successfully overcome geographical barriers.

items.title: Enhanced Commitment to Claim Settlement
items.description: GLIL has placed a strong emphasis on ensuring prompt and fair claim settlements, acknowledging the critical importance of fulfilling its responsibilities to policyholders.

items.title: Enhanced Transparency
items.description: Insured individuals can easily submit and track the status of their claims at any time.

items.title: Simplified Claims and Data Capture
items.description: GLIL's claim process is user-friendly, ensuring a seamless experience for customers.

items.title: Streamlined Workflow and Efficiency
items.description: Digitization in claim has streamlined workflows within GLIL, resulting in increased operational efficiency and optimized resource utilization.

items.title: Breaking Records
items.description: This ambitious endeavor has resulted in the settlement of 9,644 claims, marking a significant milestone.

claim_status.title: TRACK YOUR CLAIM
claim_status.subtitle: Stay updated on your claim status with our transparent tracking system. Get instant notifications and estimated completion dates.

customer_stories.title: STORIES FROM OUR CUSTOMERS
customer_stories.subtitle: See how we've helped thousands of families during their most challenging times. These are real experiences from real customers.
